data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Recording option (if enabled)', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the recording functionality. While the linked use case mentions that sessions are automatically recorded to the cloud with consent, there is no explicit evidence or API read that confirms the recording option is enabled or functioning as required. This indicates a gap in the validation process for this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the recording option is enabled or functioning.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
